query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) as COLUMNS FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('sms_log', 'winback_campaigns', 'winback_messages', 'winback_sends', 'qa_questions', 'vehicles') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PAf3reHgcPDAtuw.root --database FqYRztyCVa3fHbrFjU6jAV --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY SEQ_IN_INDEX) as COLUMNS FROM information_schema.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('sms_log', 'winback_campaigns', 'winback_messages', 'winback_sends', 'qa_questions', 'vehicles') GROUP BY TABLE_NAME, INDEX_NAME ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
stdout:
TABLE_NAME	INDEX_NAME	COLUMNS
winback_campaigns	PRIMARY	id
winback_messages	PRIMARY	id
winback_sends	PRIMARY	id
